content.text: OSSC Combined Technical Service Exam 2026 : Get complete details about OSSC Combined Technical Service Exam 2026, including recruitment updates, total vacancies, important dates, application fees, eligibility criteria, age limit, selection process, salary, syllabus, exam pattern, admit card, answer key, result, and more.

rows.text: Odisha Staff Selection Commission (OSSC) Combined Technical Service Exam 2026 Short Details of Advt. Notification

Registration & Fees Starting Date : 30/05/2026 Registration & Fees Last Date : 29/06/2026 11:59 PM Online Application Form Starting Date : 30/05/2026 Online Application Form Last Date : 02/07/2026 11:59 PM Form Correction Date : Upto 05/07/2026
Gen / SEBC / Others : 500/- SC / ST / PH : 0/- (Nil) Payment Mode : Online Mode
Age Limit : 21-42 Years Age Limit as on : 01/01/2025 The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
Prelims Written Exam Mains Written Exam Medical Examination Document Verification

Junior Engineer (Civil) : Diploma in Civil Engineering from institution recognized by Directorate of Technical Education, Odisha and must be computer literate. Architectural Assistant : Diploma in Architectural Assistantship from institution recognized by Odisha State Council of Technical Education & Vocational Training. Cameraman : Higher Secondary (+2) with Diploma/Degree in Cinematography from recognized University/Institute + skills in multi camera setup and AV production. Photographer : Higher Secondary (+2) with Diploma in Cinematography from recognized institutions + skills in Digital Photography, Photo editing and related software. Sound Recordist : Higher Secondary (+2) with Diploma/Degree in Sound Recording & TV Engineering / Sound Recording & Design from recognized institute + skills in field & studio recording and digital sound mixing. Mechanic : Higher Secondary (+2) with Diploma in Electronics from recognized institution + skills in repairing of audio visual equipment. Video Film Editor : Higher Secondary (+2) with Diploma/Degree in Video editing / Film Production from recognized Institute/University + skills in AV production, Multimedia and AV Archival. Junior Draughtsman (Civil) : HSC with NTC in Draughtsman (Civil) from NCVT affiliated institution + knowledge in Computer Application & AutoCAD. Tracer (State Cadre Field) : HSC or equivalent + NTC in Draughtsman (Civil) + Basic Computer Skill Certificate + AutoCAD Course Certificate from recognized institutions.

items: Online Application Form Last Date : 02/07/2026 11:59 PM
The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.

Cameraman : Higher Secondary (+2) with Diploma/Degree in Cinematography from recognized University/Institute + skills in multi camera setup and AV production.
Photographer : Higher Secondary (+2) with Diploma in Cinematography from recognized institutions + skills in Digital Photography, Photo editing and related software.

Sound Recordist : Higher Secondary (+2) with Diploma/Degree in Sound Recording & TV Engineering / Sound Recording & Design from recognized institute + skills in field & studio recording and digital sound mixing.
Mechanic : Higher Secondary (+2) with Diploma in Electronics from recognized institution + skills in repairing of audio visual equipment.
Video Film Editor : Higher Secondary (+2) with Diploma/Degree in Video editing / Film Production from recognized Institute/University + skills in AV production, Multimedia and AV Archival.
Junior Draughtsman (Civil) : HSC with NTC in Draughtsman (Civil) from NCVT affiliated institution + knowledge in Computer Application & AutoCAD.
Tracer (State Cadre Field) : HSC or equivalent + NTC in Draughtsman (Civil) + Basic Computer Skill Certificate + AutoCAD Course Certificate from recognized institutions.
